llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Trade Compliance Operations AP (Senior Executive)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Objectives of the Position • Support BASF group companies to meet all legal and regulatory requirements related to trade compliance. • Protect BASF’s license to operate by ensuring adherence to Import and export control, domestic regulations, sanctions, and screening obligations. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Execute trade compliance related activities for BASF companies to ensure compliance. Ensure timely update in Daily Operation Reports and regularly review compliance performance with relevant areas against business processes predefined criteria. Evaluate, analyze and verify trade compliance regulatory data and documentation to support system accuracy, database integrity, and ongoing compliance monitoring. Support team members in resolving issues related to service delivery including communication with internal customers / stakeholders / other business partners. Perform necessarily follow up action to ensure deliverables completed in a timely manner. Ensure that BASF’s trade compliance processes and standards are effectively applied across Asia Pacific (and other supported regions), covering import, export, and regulatory requirements. This includes monitoring regulatory changes, assessing business impact, managing stakeholders, and implementing compliance activities using BASF tools and digital solutions. Facilitate knowledge exchange on best practices sharing and training, including participation in regional or cross-regional projects and initiatives Report preparation, including KPI reporting, cost charging, non-conformance monitoring and improvement initiatives, using BASF tools, Visual Dashboard, and digital solutions. Act as focal point to support internal and external audits, including conducting Quality Checks to identify potential improvements and implement preventive measures. Ensure timely review, update and continuous improvement of work documentation such as process descriptions, work instructions to maintain sustainable knowledge retention and process standardization within department. Interface with various stakeholders such as Supply Chain, Customer Services and Technical Experts to enable effective implementation of compliance policies and BASF minimum requirements. Drive continuous improvement through Lean Six Sigma methodologies and digitalization initiatives to enhance operational excellence and process efficiency. Execute assigned processes with a consistently high standard of service to effectively meet the...
